description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that installs TeX Live packages in a before_script (apt-get update -qq && apt-get install -y -qq texlive texlive-xetex texlive-fonts-recommended texlive-fonts-extra, then xelatex -v). Define a deploy stage with a latex job that runs xelatex -synctex=1 -interaction=nonstopmode learn_linux_amr.tex twice, stores learn_linux_amr.pdf as an artifact that expires in one month, and runs only on the master branch or tags.
